weathergate.cloud_fog_end_distance.info: Distance where cloud fog reaches full intensity.
weathergate.cloud_height.info: Sets the rendered cloud layer height.
weathergate.dry_foliage.info: Overrides the biome dry foliage tint color.
weathergate.fog_end_distance.info: Distance from camera where fog reaches full intensity.
weathergate.fog_start_distance.info: Distance from camera where fog begins.
weathergate.foliage.info: Overrides the biome foliage tint color.
weathergate.grass.info: Overrides the biome grass tint color.
weathergate.moon_angle.info: Sets the moon rotation angle in degrees (0-360).
weathergate.night_vision_color.info: Sets the color tint used by night vision.
weathergate.sky_fog_end_distance.info: Distance where sky fog reaches full intensity.
weathergate.sky_light_factor.info: Scales sky light contribution (0 = none, 1 = normal).
weathergate.star_angle.info: Sets the star field rotation angle in degrees (0-360).
weathergate.star_brightness.info: Controls star brightness in the night sky.
weathergate.sun_angle.info: Sets the sun rotation angle in degrees (0-360).
weathergate.sun_in_a_box.tooltip: Make Sun Light value always noon (Client Only)
weathergate.sunrise_sunset_color.info: Sets the sunrise and sunset horizon tint (includes alpha).
weathergate.water.info: Overrides the biome water tint color.
weathergate.water_fog_end_distance.info: Distance from camera where underwater fog reaches full intensity.
weathergate.water_fog_start_distance.inf: Distance from camera where underwater fog begins.
